hub_subtitle: Business English for HR leadership in international meetings

lesson.menu_title: This Is What I Do — Describing Your HR Role
lesson.menu_desc: Explaining your role, your team and your routine to an international colleague -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- This Is What I Do -- Your Role, Your Team, Your Routine
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Murielle Xavier | Aula 2 -- This Is What I Do

listenings.text: Hi Murielle, it's Liam from the Australia office. Welcome to the global people team. Let me give you a quick picture of how we work. The HR business partners usually start the week with a short call on Monday morning. During the week, we handle compensation, we support the corporate areas, and we track the turnover numbers closely. We rarely make big changes on Fridays, because we always keep that day for reviews and planning. You report to the people director, and you liaise with the local managers here in Sydney. When something urgent happens, we send a quick message and sort it out. It is a busy team, but a strong one. I am sure you will fit right in. Talk soon.

Good morning, team. This is a short update from the people department. This quarter, we focus on two things: we recruit new talent for the operations in Chile, and we work hard to retain our key people in Brazil. The managers usually send their headcount reports by Wednesday. Remember, our goal is sustainable people management across every business unit. If you have questions about compensation or the salary grade, please contact your HR business partner. Thank you, and have a great week.
